name: Home fitness equipment
summary: Treadmills, bikes, ellipticals, rowers, connected-fitness bikes — high-price, high-return-rate, subscription-entangled category.

evidence.claim: Peloton, NordicTrack, Tonal and similar connected-fitness equipment require active subscription to unlock most features; bricks without subscription average $15-40/month.

criteria.name: motor_chp
criteria.notes: Continuous horsepower for treadmills. 'Peak' HP is marketing — CHP is the durability metric.

criteria.name: subscription_required
criteria.notes: Critical: Peloton/NordicTrack/Tonal require subscription to unlock features (E1).

confabulationPatterns.reality: 'Peak HP' is instantaneous max draw; CHP (Continuous Horsepower) is the sustained metric that matters for treadmill durability under real running loads.
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Is the cited HP Peak or Continuous? Continuous is the fair number for heavy use.

confabulationPatterns.reality: Often technically true — equipment works without subscription — but most features (classes, leaderboard, trainers, metrics) are paywalled (E1). Real usability depends on the subscription.
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: What specific features work WITHOUT subscription? Often limited to 'just a screen showing speed/time'.

confabulationPatterns.reality: Subjective claim. Class library depth and instructor availability vary by time zone and day. Check the free class catalog before subscribing.

counterfeitSignals.signal: Peloton Bike+ listed >40% off from marketplace seller
counterfeitSignals.action: flag — used models require subscription re-enrollment

compatibilityQuestions: Flooring type and ceiling height? Treadmills need 7ft+ clearance; weights/rowers can impact downstairs neighbors.
Will you actually use it? High return rates ~30%; measure floor space for the unopened-return scenario.

typicalHiddenCosts.name: Flooring mat, bike shoes, heart-rate monitor
Return shipping if unhappy (often $250+ for treadmills)

repairability.notes: NordicTrack / Peloton have authorized service. Consumer-grade treadmills often have 90-day motor warranty only.
